reviews.comment:
No carguen nafta ahí! Siempre cargaba. Y este  verano, primera quincena de febrero del 2020, llené el tanque con premium para volver a casa, y el auto me vino fallando  durante todo el viaje. Pensé que era algo del auto y resultó ser la nafta. Nunca más cargo ahí. El problema es que hay solo otra ypf , y la verdad no se a donde ir a cargar. Una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
Don't fill up there! I used to. And this summer, the first half of February 2020, I filled the tank with premium to go home, and the car was acting up the whole trip. I thought it was something wrong with the car, but it turned out to be the gas. I'm never filling up there again. The problem is there's only one other YPF station, and I honestly don't know where else to fill up. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzXzZqSk5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Leeentooossssss...... Pocos playeros por lo cual la atención es lenta, casi inmóvil,  y siempre hay una cola larguísima de autos.... Para cargar nafta una hora!😵 Los sanitarios bien, con papel, jabón y agua... puertas con cerraduras rotas, y algo sucios, nada importante por destacar...

(Translated by Google)
Sooooow... There are so few attendants, so the service is slow, almost nonexistent, and there's always a very long line of cars... It takes an hour to fill up with gas! 😵 The restrooms are fine, with toilet paper, soap, and water... doors with broken locks, and a bit dirty, nothing major to mention...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOThudXNBRRAB
